issue_summary: Use DenseConjunctionBulkScorer for single queries sometimes.
javadoc_before:
/**
 * BulkScorer implementation of {@link ConjunctionScorer} that is specialized for dense clauses.
 * Whenever sensible, it intersects clauses by loading their matches into a bit set and computing
 * the intersection of clauses by and-ing these bit sets.
 */
javadoc_after:
/** * BulkScorer implementation of {@link ConjunctionScorer} that is specialized for dense clauses. * Whenever sensible, it intersects clauses by loading their matches into a bit set and computing * the intersection of clauses by and-ing these bit sets. * *

An empty set of iterators is interpreted as meaning that all docs in [0, maxDoc) match. */
